message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title create file, add, reset, delete

box "GIT                                          jalbertomr.blogspot.com" #LightGray
participant "Working dir" as WD #Red
participant "Stage" as S #LightGreen
database "History" as H
end box

actor User as U1

[-> U1
U1 -> U1

== create file2, add, reset, delete ==

U1 -> WD : create file2

rnote over S #Salmon : file2 created

WD -> S : **git add file2**

rnote over H #LightGreen : file2 created

S -> WD : **git [ reset | reset file2 | reset HEAD file2 ]**

rnote over S #Salmon : file2 created

WD ..> U1 : delete file2

actor User as U2

[-> U2
U2 -> U2

participant "Working dir" as WD2 #Red
participant "Stage" as S2 #LightGreen
database "History" as H2

@enduml
```
